name: Hot & Sour Vermicelli Salad (Yam Wun Sen)
recipeIngredient: 4 oz Dry clear vermicelli noodles (soaked in water for 20 minutes until soft, then drained)
recipeInstructions:
1. Line a serving dish with lettuce and set aside.
2. Fry the garlic in the oil until golden brown and set aside.
3. In a saucepan, heat the stock and add the fresh mushrooms, cook momentarily.
4. Add all the other yam ingredients (vermicelli noodles, black fungus mushrooms, fresh button mushrooms, shallots, spring onion, celery, carrot) and stir for approximately one minute until thoroughly mixed.
5. Finally, add the garlic oil and mix well.
6. Turn on to the lettuce and garnish with coriander.
